Class OpenAiChatProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.model.openai.autoconfigure.AbstractOpenAiProperties
org.springframework.ai.model.openai.autoconfigure.OpenAiChatProperties
@ConfigurationProperties("spring.ai.openai.chat") public class OpenAiChatProperties extends AbstractOpenAiProperties
OpenAI SDK Chat autoconfiguration properties.
Author:
Christian Tzolov, Sebastien Deleuze, guan xu
